message:
fix(search): use shared references for tantivy IndexWriter and suppress clippy too_many_lines

- Change add_indexable_message() and upsert_indexable_message() to take
  &tantivy::IndexWriter instead of &mut, matching tantivy's API where
  IndexWriter methods take &self (interior mutability via locks)
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to backfill_from_db() which
  legitimately needs its length for sequential DB scan + batch indexing
- Fix doc comment escaping for FrankenSQLite reference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
